text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Good day. I am Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll be needing you—a legendary trainer in the
making—to lend me your strength so I can
become a magnificent, elegant, and gallant
princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And don't you worry! I'll pulverize any obstacle
that gets in my way with my Princess☆Kick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
